title: cyclospermum leptophyllum var. leptophyllum
intro: Cyclospermum leptophyllum var. leptophyllum, also known as parsley piñon or parsley fern, is a perennial plant native to South America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Cyclospermum leptophyllum var. leptophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
